description: An introduction to the policy process in the public sector. Includes analysis of current theories of policy-making and examines case studies from Canadian contexts. Topics include: policy formation; the policy communication process; the structural aspects of policy execution; and the human dimensions of implementation and coordination of policies in public sector organizations.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete 1 of:
    • ADMN311 - Introduction to Public Administration (1.5)
    • POLI350 - Introduction to Public Administration (1.5)
recommendations: • ADMN 310 and/or ADMN 314 recommended prior to ADMN 420.
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of ADMN 420, ADMN 465.
title: The Public Policy Process
